case_title: RACHEL EZIRIM VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM CHASE BANK RE JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(AGENT FOR SERVICE: C T CORP. SYS.) SERVED MAY-04-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EZIRIM, RACHEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY EZIRIM, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EZIRIM, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2012 - JUDGMENT.
